audit_items.proof_trace: All internal pointer dereferences are guarded: fopen result checked at L41-44, ber_memalloc result checked at L66-70 with cleanup, ber_memrealloc result checked at L79-85 with cleanup. The `passwd` parameter is not null-checked within the function, but all five callers (common.c:1469, ldappasswd.c:213/238, slappasswd.c:245, slapd-tester.c:413) pass stack-allocated bervals and always verify the filename is non-NULL before calling. The reachability claim of LDAP external exposure is inaccurate; this function is only called from command-line utilities at process startup, not from slapd's LDAP protocol handling path.
